name: bing-geo-optimization
description: Optimize content to get cited by Microsoft Copilot and Bing's generative AI answers. Grounded in a real Bing Webmaster Tools AI citation export: the defined-jargon + named-tools + benchmark-numbers recipe that wins grounding queries, how to read Bing's AI Performance reports, the grounding-query reverse-engineering method, and IndexNow technical eligibility.
